# Financial News Wire — Full Article Index

> Financial news, straight from the source.

This file contains all articles published by Financial News Wire for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.

{% assign sorted_news = site.news | sort: 'date' | reverse %}{% for article in sorted_news %}
---

## {{ article.title }}

- **Date**: {{ article.date | date: '%Y-%m-%d' }}
- **Company**: {{ article.company }}
- **Tags**: {{ article.tags | join: ', ' }}
- **URL**: {{ article.url | absolute_url }}
- **Source**: {{ article.source_url }}

{{ article.content | strip_html | strip_newlines | truncatewords: 200 }}

{% endfor %}
